NXT-66038.summary: AcctMgt - Accounts - Excel export update for Barcode fields
NXT-66038.rn_title: Barcodes on the Account Management Excel Export
NXT-66038.ac:
* Barcode columns export to excel with the ID surrounded in * symbols
** Example: ID 12345 → *12345*
* Nice to have: barcode font used for the data in those columns
NXT-66038.rn:
The export off of the Accounts grid has been updated to have the Code 39 barcode font used by default for barcode columns.

*Please note:* You need to have the Code 39 barcode font on your computer in order for these to show as a scannable barcode. They will otherwise show as follows: *12345678* 

You may need to work with your IT team to install the font. A link to the font is available on the ID Cards page within the Account Management module.

NXT-67407.summary: Elig - Apps - Controls for Automatic Pending Apps
NXT-67407.rn_title: New Controls Added for Pending Applications
NXT-67407.ac:
* New settings page added
** Name: Form Settings
** Location: Between Eligibility Descriptions and Optional Benefits
* User can see all Automatic Pending Reasons for applications (View Permission)
* User can control them (Edit Permission)
* Role permission for updating these
** Provide it to the usual roles: Director, Central Office, SchoolCafe Admin, Internal Roles
** View and Edit
NXT-67407.rn:
We have added the ability to control the scenarios that lead to an online application being parked as pending. You can toggle the variety of reasons on or off with the new Form Settings page.

This was requested by districts who wanted the ability to let certain scenarios passthru for automatic approval purposes.

All directors and central office staff should have access to the new page with this update. If you don’t, check the Roles and Permissions page in the System module.
NXT-67407.desc:
As Dana the Director I am using FRE Apps for all my CEP sites as my state requires us to still process apps. Right now, all apps at CEP sites are going into Pending, which means I have to manually process them.

*requirements*

* Add a Configuration page to allow the user to see all Automatic Pending Reasons for applications
** Page name: Form Settings
* User can turn off Automatic Pending Reasons
* If a pending reason is turned off - proceed with the application as normal.
* Manual Entry workflows will not be changed as part of this - only Online app submission.

||*Description*||*Actions*||
| |Toggle|
| | |

Text string for the top of the page:

{noformat}This page lets you control scenarios where an online application, with automatic processing, may be parked as pending. 

For example, applications with students at CEP sites are typically moved to Pending as they are not usually processed. But if you turn that option off, they will be processed per usual and will not be in Pending Applications.{noformat}

NXT-72794.summary: Acct Mgmt - Accounts - Fix Weekly Checkbox Display/Export
NXT-72794.ac: Verify that the Export is now fixed (or new option added) to properly display Weekly Checkboxes.
NXT-72794.desc:
As a district admin, I would like a functional replacement in SchoolCafé for the Classic POS Roster report, so that I can provide this to all of my teachers who frequently breakfast-in-the-classroom and need a sheet to properly record meals each day.

*Summary*

In Acct Mgmt → Accounts, the _Weekly Checkbox_ column option does not properly display when exported to Excel. Let’s either fix this, or otherwise add a PDF export for the grid to go with the Excel export.

*Background*

In the absence of a true POS Roster report, we funnel users to the grid on this page and ask them to use the Weekly Checkbox column. However, it appears to not function correctly. The default view has all options smashed together.

!image-20260512-152801.png|width=969,alt="image-20260512-152801.png"!

Reducing the screen width to 50% shows them correctly (unless I remove columns), but this section still does not display in the Excel export or by printing the screen.

!image-20260512-152910.png|width=968,alt="image-20260512-152910.png"!

!image-20260512-181133.png|width=966,alt="image-20260512-181133.png"!

NXT-72800.summary: Acct Mgmt - Accounts - Student Details - Add Race options for Middle Eastern or North African (MENA) and South Asian
NXT-72800.rn_title: Middle Eastern or North African (MENA) and South Asian Racial Identities Now Supported
NXT-72800.ac:
* Verify that in a student's Demographics tab, in the Race field, we've added 2 new options to the drop-down:
** Middle Eastern or North African (MENA) 
** South Asian

* Verify that these get properly handled--if possible--in case of a student import file containing them (This may be handled in a separate story and can be checked again at that point)
NXT-72800.rn: Two new options, _Middle Eastern or North African (MENA)_ and _South Asian,_ have been added as potential selections in the Racial Identity field of an account’s details. These options will also be available within applications, in the family portal and as a potential field in person imports in the near future.
NXT-72800.desc:
As a district admin, I would like to have my student information data to reflect the new state and federal updates regarding collection of Race and Ethnicity data, so that I may be in compliance.



*Details*

* In Account Management → Accounts -> Student Details -> Summary section, in the Race field, add 2 new options to the drop-down:
** Middle Eastern or North African (MENA) 
** South Asian
* Display all options in alphabetical order

!image-20260512-182908.png|width=1066,alt="image-20260512-182908.png"!



*Mockup*

N/A

NXT-73317.summary: Acct Mgmt - Accounts - Details - Display Form Notifications in Correspondence section
NXT-73317.ac: Verify that any notification letter printed in Other Forms is then saved and visible in the student(s)'s Correspondence section in their Account Details
NXT-73317.desc:
As a Cybersoft Implementation team member or district admin, I would like to be able to add Summer EBT (as well as any other non-traditional form) applications at a district-level with minimal steps, so that I do not have to use an external system just for this purpose.

*Summary*

* When a Form application is notified, display the letter history in the related student(s)'s Correspondence section in their Account Details.

*Details*

* In Eligibility > Forms > Other Forms, when a user has notified a household for a Form application, do the following in Account Management > Accounts, in the Account Details page for each student on that application:
** In their Correspondence section, display the summary details of the emailed/printed letter
** Display a View icon to open the historical notification
*** Verify that it opens the specific letter template for that form
*** Allow the user to print the letter again if needed


*Mockups*

N/A
